task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the correct axial slice showing the frontal horns and caudate heads
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of 3D Slicer showing an axial view of the brain where the frontal horns of the lateral ventricles and the caudate heads are clearly visible and prominent.

task_completion.description: Agent places a ruler to measure the intercaudate distance
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a measurement line (ruler) drawn connecting the medial borders of the two caudate heads across the septum pellucidum.

task_completion.description: Agent places a ruler to measure the brain width at the same level
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a measurement line (ruler) spanning the width of the brain between the inner tables of the skull at the same axial level as the intercaudate measurement.

task_completion.description: Agent calculates the Bicaudate Index (BCI) correctly based on measurements
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a text editor, terminal, or script output showing the `intercaudate_distance_mm`, `brain_width_mm`, and a `bicaudate_index` value that mathematically equals the distance divided by the width.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly classifies the finding and saves the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the generated JSON report with a `classification` field (Normal, Borderline, or Atrophic) that matches the BCI thresholds (Normal < 0.15, Borderline 0.15-0.18, Atrophic > 0.18), and evidence of saving `bicaudate_report.json`.

integrity.description: Agent uses the 3D Slicer GUI Markups/Ruler tool for measurements
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the 3D Slicer interface with the Markups module or ruler tool active and measurement lines visible on the scan.

integrity.description: Agent derives values from the software, not external knowledge
integrity.visual_evidence: The report generation should occur after the visual measurements are placed on the scan; the agent should not simply type numbers into a file without measuring.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the medical imaging software
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer application window is the primary focus of the agent's interaction, not just a code editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Clinical thresholds for Bicaudate Index (BCI): Normal < 0.15, Borderline 0.15-0.18, Atrophic > 0.18. BCI is calculated as Intercaudate Distance / Brain Width.
